block_00: Take a look at the top news of the week
block_03: At this week's low, Microsoft stock was down more than 31.5% from its all-time high. That's the worst decline in more than a decade. Microsoft has reported mostly solid quarterly results and even just this week, it delivered a 10% dividend boost. So far, though, it hasn’t mattered as Microsoft stock made new 52-week lows on Tuesday.
block_07: The bank will give a “substantial upgrade” to its targets alongside third-quarter results, said CEO Andrea Orcel. He also expects an extra billion euros in revenue – the stock price has risen by 4% this week.
block_10: The company has suspended its Chief Operating Officer Doug Ramsey. This is after he was arrested over the weekend for allegedly biting someone's nose after a football game. The share price has fallen by 25% in one week.
